apiUrl.title: API Endpoint URL
apiUrl.description: Full URL of the API endpoint. Use {{value}} as a placeholder for the lookup field value. Example: https://api.example.com/lookup/{{value}} or https://api.example.com/enrich?ip={{value}}

apiKey.title: API Key / Token
apiKey.description: API key, token, or credentials for authentication. For Basic auth, use username:password format.

authType.title: Authentication Type
authType.description: How to send the API key. Header: custom header name. Bearer: Authorization: Bearer <key>. Query: appended as api_key= param. Basic: Base64-encoded Authorization header. None: no auth.

authHeaderName.title: Custom Auth Header Name
authHeaderName.description: Header name when using 'Custom Header' auth type (e.g., X-API-Key, key, Authorization)

lookupField.title: Lookup Field
lookupField.description: Event field whose value is sent to the API for enrichment (e.g., ip, src_ip, hostname, hash)

enrichPrefix.title: Enrichment Field Prefix
enrichPrefix.description: Prefix added to all enrichment fields written to the event (e.g., 'enrichment_' produces enrichment_score, enrichment_category, etc.)

requestMethod.title: HTTP Method
requestMethod.description: HTTP method for the API call

requestTimeout.title: Request Timeout (ms)
requestTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait for an API response in milliseconds

bodyTemplate.title: Request Body Template (POST/PUT only)
bodyTemplate.description: JSON body template for POST/PUT requests. Use {{value}} for the lookup value. Example: {"query": "{{value}}", "type": "ip"}. Leave empty for default {"query": "<value>"}.

responseMode.title: Response Handling Mode
responseMode.description: How to apply API response data to the event
enumNames: Merge All Fields (flatten top-level keys with prefix)
Store Raw JSON (single field with full response)

selectedFields.title: Selected Response Fields (selective mode)
selectedFields.description: Dot-notation paths to extract from the API response (e.g., 'score', 'geo.country', 'tags'). Only used in Selective mode.

fieldMappings.title: Field Mappings (selective mode)
fieldMappings.description: Optional rename mappings: source response path -> destination event field name

staticHeaders.title: Additional HTTP Headers
staticHeaders.description: Extra headers to include in API requests (e.g., custom User-Agent, Accept version, etc.)

cacheTTL.title: Cache TTL (seconds)
cacheTTL.description: Cache API responses for this many seconds to reduce duplicate lookups. 0 = no caching.

rateLimitMs.title: Rate Limit (ms between requests)
rateLimitMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between API requests. Helps avoid hitting API rate limits. 0 = no rate limiting.
